title: Machlah #4244
definition:
Mahlah = "disease"

 1) the eldest of 5 daughters of Zelophehad the grandson of Manasseh
 2) a Gileadite
nasbUsage:
Definition: Mahlah = "disease"

 1) the eldest of 5 daughters of Zelophehad the grandson of Manasseh
 2) a Gileadite

    NASB:  a daughter of Zelophehad, also a Gileadite
